note: MROW spans MISO-West and part of SPP; mapped to MISO (larger share). Both are elevated-or-high areas.
NWPP spans WECC-Northwest and WECC-Basin; both are High-risk from 2029.
RFCW is mostly PJM-West with MISO fringes; both High-risk in the 2025 LTRA window.
Lower Mississippi Valley is predominantly MISO-South.
SRVC spans PJM (Virginia) and Carolinas (SERC-East). Virginia sites should override to PJM; curated sites carry an explicit rto override.
